name: GA4 Setup Checklist & Event Taxonomy
description: Complete GA4 configuration checklist covering account setup; consent and privacy; enhanced measurement; and custom event taxonomy for engagement; conversion; product; and e-commerce events
best_for: Initial GA4 property configuration; event tracking implementation; e-commerce tracking setup

name: UTM Parameter Standards
description: Quick reference for UTM parameter naming conventions including source; medium; campaign; term; and content parameters
best_for: Campaign URL tagging; traffic source classification; marketing channel identification

name: Marketing Attribution Models
description: Comprehensive comparison of attribution models (last-click; first-click; linear; time-decay; position-based; data-driven; MMM) with selection guide and incrementality testing
best_for: Choosing the right attribution model; understanding channel contribution; incrementality measurement

name: Dashboard Design Frameworks
description: Templates for executive; channel; campaign; and content dashboards with key metrics; audiences; update cadences; and design best practices
best_for: Building marketing dashboards; defining KPI visualizations; stakeholder reporting

name: A/B Test Design Framework
description: End-to-end A/B testing methodology covering hypothesis formation; sample size calculation; test execution checklist; analysis decision framework; and common mistakes
best_for: Designing statistically valid A/B tests; calculating sample sizes; interpreting test results

name: Cohort Analysis Methodology
description: Methodology for acquisition; behavioral; and channel cohorts with retention table templates and guidance on reading cohort data for retention and product-market fit signals
best_for: User retention analysis; product-market fit assessment; channel quality comparison

name: Customer LTV Calculation Methods
description: Four LTV calculation methods (historical; predictive; cohort-based; DCF) with formulas; examples; and LTV:CAC ratio and payback period benchmarks
best_for: Calculating customer lifetime value; LTV:CAC ratio analysis; payback period assessment

name: Funnel Analysis Framework
description: Three-step funnel methodology (identify; measure; optimize) with standard and SaaS funnel stages; benchmark conversion rates; and visualization best practices
best_for: Mapping conversion funnels; identifying drop-off points; optimizing stage transitions

name: Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)
description: When to use MMM; the six-step MMM process; and comparison of open-source tools (Meta Robyn; Google Meridian; PyMC Marketing; Lightweight MMM)
best_for: Budget allocation optimization for large multi-channel programs; offline channel measurement

name: Data Quality & Governance
description: Data quality checklist for tracking validation and reporting hygiene rules for maintaining reliable analytics
best_for: Auditing tracking implementation; establishing reporting standards; preventing analytics debt
